# BikeBoxHire.io

> BikeBoxHire.io is a hard-shell bike box rental service for triathletes,
> road cyclists, and adventure riders across Scotland's central belt
> (Edinburgh and Glasgow). Customers hire a Road/Gravel or TT/Aero box for
> a fixed period, collect it from a partner bike shop or storage locker,
> pack their bike using the included guides and GPS tracker, and return it
> after their trip or race.

## Key facts

- Two box types: Road/Gravel (fits road and gravel bikes) and TT/Aero
  (fits TT/aero, MTB, and electric bikes).
- Hard-shell construction with a built-in GPS tracker, packing foam, and
  disc brake protection included with every hire.
- Pricing: 7-day hire £99.95, 10-day hire £135. Refundable £200 damage
  deposit held on card, released within 5–7 business days on clean return.
- Collection and return via partner bike shops in Edinburgh and Glasgow,
  or trusted locker locations in Edinburgh. Pickup available Tuesdays and
  Thursdays.
- Contact: hello@bikeboxhire.io

## Pages

- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://faq.bikeboxhire.io/): full Q&A
  covering pricing, fit, collection, deposits, GPS tracking, and
  cancellations.
- [Cycling Shop Partnerships](https://faq.bikeboxhire.io/request-info-pack.html):
  information for bike shops interested in hosting boxes and earning
  commission.
- [Main site](https://bikeboxhire.io/): booking, pricing, and how it works.
